title: Deflection
summary: Force a piece to move where it shouldn't

steps.title: The Lure
steps.text: Deflection is forcing an enemy piece away from a key square or defensive role. Often it's done with a check or a tempting capture. The piece can't refuse, and its departure opens a winning line.

steps.prompt: Invade with the rook. What happens if Black trades?
steps.hint: Ra8 pressures the rook on e8 — a trade simplifies the game.

steps.title: Forced Exchange
steps.text: Black will likely trade (Rxa8 or Rb8). After the trade, simplification favors the active side. The lesson: pressure forces decisions — and decisions under pressure usually go wrong.
